tester: Claude Code (self-verification -- AGENTS.md permits 'at most ONE initial verification pass' by the Coder; no independent Playwright MCP pass was run)
verificationMethod: Served www/ as a static site and drove it in a real headless-browser session across all phases this session (navigation, clicks, file-input simulation with a real synthetic image blob, localStorage/IndexedDB inspection, computed-style/getBoundingClientRect checks, network-request inspection, console-error checks). Phase 5: Habit Tracker full lifecycle -- add habit -> toggle complete (streak 0->1, week 0/7->1/7, month 0->1, correct local-date key persisted) -> toggle off (streak reverts) -> inline rename -> delete via confirmDialog (correct message, confirmed, habit + history removed)
